description: Create server-side kit summary read model with derived status, pricing mode, component count, buildable quantity, and usage metadata.
Create server-side kit detail read model with product identity, inventory settings, BOM rows, stock/cost context, pricing/margin, readiness, and sales-order behavior data.
Add create-kit action that creates a product-backed kit and enables inventory with is_kit=true.
Add update-kit action for identity and kit pricing fields exposed by the Kits screen.
Replace the Kits page header with Inventory kits summary counts and a primary Create kit action.
Add searchable/filterable kit list with status, SKU, pricing mode, can-build quantity, component count, and row action.
Add selected-kit detail view with product identity, BOM, pricing/margin, stock readiness, sales-order behavior, and usage links.
Make component loading clear stale BOM rows immediately and show inline retry on load failure.
Render empty BOM as an explicit warning state.
Make duplicate component add read as an update-quantity operation.
Validate positive integer component quantities in the UI.
Expose and validate fixed-price kit amount when kit pricing mode is fixed.
Map known kit server errors to human operator-facing explanations.
Preserve existing sales-order kit explosion behavior: priced parent and zero-dollar child component lines.
Add inventory locale keys for all new Kits screen copy.
Use one transaction-safe kit price resolver for summary, detail preview, and sales-order mutations without a sum-mode catalog-rate fallback.
Render sum-mode kit price as a read-only calculated amount based on BOM component selling prices.
Render exactly one editable kit price when fixed pricing is selected.
Make Create kit request a price only for fixed mode and allow sum-mode kits to be created before their BOM is defined.
Seed a sales-order kit line from the canonical resolved price unless the user explicitly changes that order line's price.
Identify a changed sales-order kit price as an order-specific override and let the user reset it to the resolved kit price before save.
Show the component selling-price basis for a calculated sum-mode kit price separately from component cost and margin.
Label component cost, gross profit, and gross margin as separate financial facts.
Order Create kit fields by dependency and remove the separate kit cost input that does not drive kit margin.
Enable Save pricing only when pricing mode or fixed price has unsaved changes.
Require an explicit order-specific kit price when the sales-order currency differs from the configured kit currency.
Suppress cost, gross profit, and gross margin when component costs are missing or use another currency.
